title: raillardella nevadensis
intro: Raillardella nevadensis, also known as Nevada Mountain everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb that grows in mountainous regions, particularly in the western United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of Raillardella nevadensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to promote overall health and well-being, with potential benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
